name: tmux
description: Canonical guide for one agent (Claude) to drive and observe OTHER interactive CLIs inside tmux. Triggers: 'drive codex/gemini/aider in tmux', 'spawn/reuse a tmux session/window/pane', 'send-keys to a CLI', 'capture-pane output', 'detect when the CLI is idle/done', 'orchestrate an agent CLI'. Reference implementation other plugins (codex) link to.
